title: Portable Context Control Plane — TraceEntry
description: Internal object schema for a single TraceEntry record embedded in selectorPhase.selectorTrace[]. TraceEntry is NOT a SelectionDecision — they are two distinct companion object types with a bi-directional reference relationship (SelectionDecision.traceRefs[] points to TraceEntry.decisionId). Canonical owner: docs/04 §7.8; also docs/06 §3.2, §17.6.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-3 (Batch C creation). No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8; docs/06 §3.2, §17.6. CRITICAL: selectorTrace is array of TraceEntry, not array of SelectionDecision — do not conflate these types.

decisionId.description: UUID-style identifier linking this trace entry to its SelectionDecision. Referenced in SelectionDecision.traceRefs[]. Provides the bi-directional link between the decision record and the trace event. Canonical: docs/06 §3.2; docs/04 §7.8.

componentId.description: Registry ID of the component that was evaluated for this trace event. Must not contain raw component content. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

module.description: Selector module name that produced this trace entry (e.g., 'ScaffoldSelector', 'ToolSelector', 'HistorySelector'). Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

action.description: The action produced by this trace event. Must match the action in the corresponding SelectionDecision. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for the trace event. Must not contain raw component content, raw history turn content, or raw user message text. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

evidence.description: Signal atoms recorded for this trace event (e.g., 'promptFamily=simple_greeting', 'requiredWhen=coding_build_debug', 'injection_suspect_seen=true'). Must not contain raw component content or raw user text. Note: 'injection_suspect_seen' is a trace/evidence atom, not a warning code — it appears here in evidence[], not in warningsEmitted. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8; docs/06 §17.3.1.

confidence.description: Selector confidence for this trace event: high, medium, or low. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

risk.description: Component risk level at the time this trace entry was produced (read from registry metadata). Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

tokens.description: Estimated token savings if this component is omitted. Must be 0 for include and defer decisions. Must never be nonzero for runtime_unavailable defer decisions — a deferred unavailable tool is not token savings. Canonical: docs/06 §14.3 invariant; docs/06 §20.3 rule 8.

estimatedSavings.description: Token savings estimate for omit decisions only. Always present; tokens: 0 for include and defer. Must not claim nonzero savings for runtime_unavailable defer. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

failOpen.description: true if this trace event was a fail-open outcome (action: include, path: fail_open, or any injection-gate override to include/fail_open). false otherwise. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8.

selector.description: Identifies the selector mode. Always 'deterministic' in MVP — model-assisted selectors are not implemented. Canonical: docs/04 §7.8; docs/06 §16.

injectionSuspect.description: Optional. true when requestSignals.injectionSuspect was true at the time this trace entry was produced. Present only when injectionSuspect: true. When present, must be true. Canonical: docs/06 §17.6.

injectionSuspectAction.description: Optional. The effective applied injection policy value ('warn_and_continue' or 'fail_open_all') that governed behavior for this decision. Present only when injectionSuspect: true. This is the effective policy — not the requested policy if a fallback occurred. Canonical: docs/06 §17.6.

actionChanged.description: Optional. true if the injection gate overrode the candidate action (e.g., converted an omit to include/fail_open). false if the candidate passed through unchanged. Present only when injectionSuspect: true. When true, originalCandidateAction and originalCandidatePath are required. Canonical: docs/06 §17.4, §17.6; F-20 resolved.

originalCandidateAction.description: Optional. The action the deterministic ladder produced before the injection gate overrode it (e.g., 'omit'). Required when actionChanged: true. This is the canonical source of pre-gate action context for the Conflict Resolver (via SelectionDecision.traceRefs). Canonical: docs/06 §17.6; F-20 resolved.

originalCandidatePath.description: Optional. The path the deterministic ladder produced before the injection gate overrode it (e.g., 'safe_to_omit_match'). Required when actionChanged: true. Canonical: docs/06 §17.6; F-20 resolved.

warningsEmitted.description: Optional. Array of warning codes emitted for this specific trace entry (e.g., injection_suspect_omit_allowed, injection_suspect_policy_override, path_a_null_evidence). Per-decision warnings only — must NOT include global per-run codes (injection_suspect_warn_and_continue, injection_suspect_fail_open_all). Canonical: docs/06 §17.6.
